info.title: FuFirE — Fusion Firmament Engine
info.description: FuFirE: Deterministic astronomical calculation engine for BaZi (Chinese Astrology) and Western Astrology with Wu-Xing fusion.

post.description: Wu-Xing element vector from western planetary positions.
Combined chart: Western positions + BaZi pillars + time scales + Wu-Xing.
ElevenLabs Agent Tool: Astrology chart for a birth date.

get.description: Current planetary positions from Swiss Ephemeris.

parameters.name: datetime

schema.description: Optional UTC datetime in ISO format. Default: now.
schema.title: Datetime

parameters.description: Optional UTC datetime in ISO format. Default: now.

post.description: Personalized transit state combining current transits with user profile.
Generate narrative text from transit state. Template-based, <50ms (ADR-3).

trigger_planet.title: Trigger Planet
trigger_planet.description: Planet that triggered the event (empty string for dominance_shift).

TransitEvent.title: TransitEvent
TransitEvent.description: A single transit event as produced by compute_transit_state().

TransitStateInput.title: TransitStateInput
TransitStateInput.description: Typed transit state matching the TRANSIT_STATE_v1 schema.

bazi_pillars_override.description: Optional override of BaZi pillars (skips anchor dependency).

now_utc_override.description: For deterministic tests: fixed 'now' used for expiry checks.

positions_override.description: Optional override of western body positions (skips ephemeris).
